PRIN.agent_summary: 17 enterprise architecture principles, telco/AI-native open-core. 3 NON-NEGOTIABLE.

REQ.agent_summary: 49 requirements (6 BR, 13 FR, 23 NFR, 4 INT, 3 data). AI IN SCOPE. 2 conflicts resolved.

MY_MYDIGITAL.agent_summary: MyDIGITAL alignment as commercial-enabler (not public-sector obligation): Thrust 2 (economic competitiveness via autonomous fulfilment), Thrust 3 (5G infra activation), Thrust 4 + National AI agenda (RFC 9315/agentic-AI capability, responsible AI). NOTE: arckit:my-mydigital is a slash command not a Skill; worker executed command process directly.

ADR-002.topic: Operator identity — Keycloak / CAMARA / auth-jwt integration and assurance level
ADR-002.agent_summary: Decision: Keycloak central commercial IdP + constrained agent realm role (client-credentials, least privilege) + CAMARA-native egress auth vaulted; two-tier JWT assurance (elevated for network-mutating ops). Chose Option 1 of 4 (rejected CAMARA-native-primary and federated-operator-IdP). Hook allocated file sequence ADR-001.
